_doc: Economy foundation constants. Anti-inflation lock + sink/source tracking config. CMD2 Phase 11 Mục VII-VIII.
_dna_lock: TS Online economy — gold/item flow controlled, no AAA loot explosion.

inflation._doc: Inflation guard: gold supply growth phải nằm trong target_per_day_bp.

gold_source_caps_per_tick._doc: Gold source caps per tick per player (anti farm bot). 0 = uncapped.

gold_sink_min_ratio_bp._doc: Min ratio (BP) of gold supply phải bị sunk over inflation window. Phòng deflation.
gold_sink_min_ratio_bp._explain: 70% gold sourced phải bị sunk lại — repair, vendor_buy, upgrade, crafting.

rarity_inflation_caps._doc: Số item per rarity TỐI ĐA per player per day. Anti hoarding mythic.

_replay_doc: Max 1 loot mismatch per 1 million rolls before alert critical.
